title: Debugger Settings
text: Debugger Settings Specify diagnostic settings for the current Debugger session. For information on the settings available on each tab, choose the tab, then press F1 . The settings that you apply become the active settings for the current debugging session. Settings Buttons Understand the buttons that might display for the Debugger settings. Apply —apply the settings. Close —apply the settings and close the form. How to Go to View > Preferences and ensure that On close: save state & preferences is selected. To save the settings under a specific name, click Add . Enter a name and description and choose Apply . Related Links Settings: I/O Print Choose the level of I/O messages that are displayed in the message frame or transcript window. Settings: Triggers Choose the triggers you want to be enabled or disabled for debugging, or those that you want to be set as breakpoints. Settings: Tracing Choose the level or type of ProcScript-related tracing to be displayed in the message frame or transcript window. Settings: Errors Set a specific ProcScript error value ($procerror) as a breakpoint. Settings: Message Frame Specify whether the clrmess ProcScript instruction is enabled or disabled, and whether application messages are sent to the application's message frame or to the application's transcript window.
